en: Most companies in Poland are required to register with the National Court Register (KRS).
Is your company registered on the National Court Register (KRS)?
The KRS number is issued by the National Court Register to companies that register on their database. It typically contains 10 digits.
Please provide your company's KRS number.
You can verify your NIP (Number Identyfikacji Podatkowej) here.
Does your company have a NIP number?
The NIP number will typically contain 10 digits.
Please provide your company's NIP number.
CEDIG is maintained by the Ministry of Development, Labour and Technology. It is granted to all entrepreneurs (both sole-traders and companies).
Is your company registered on the National Register of Entrepreneurs (CEDIG)?
Does your company have a REGON number?
If yes, please provide your company's REGON number.
Please indicate your company's business entity / form of business within this country.
Foreign entity with no local fiscal presence
Please indicate where your company is established:
Please provide your company's CEDIG number.
